ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT LAWTON COSTELLO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Continued To Aug-14-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sergei Limansky (415-341-5453) Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - ARGUED. The Court vacates the tentavie ruling and rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LAWTON COSTELLO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to August 14, 2017 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Plaintiff to file an Opposition prior to the hearing. Plaintiff to give notice to the opposing side. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/SRB)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Continued To Aug-29-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Serbei Limansky appearing on his own behalf. Alston L. Low, Esq., appearing for DefendantLawton M. Costello. The OSC is re-set to August 29, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
